$comment: Layer B selection cases for TARIFF vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O2x, an alphanumeric code table at literal subscripts). Candidate B fills the zone-code table in the wrong order (the 0/1-base fill slip), so C1..C3 come out shuffled while the charges stay right - caught on every case. Cases cover the 50.00 BULK boundary (TOTAL exactly 50.00 at weight 19.61 stays STD; 19.62 goes BULK), a triple half-cent weight, and small and max weights.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TARIFF (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tariff)
